title: SNAIL GARDEN 12pcs Vintage Artificial Flowers Fake Peony Blossom Silk Flowers Bouquet for Bridal Wedding Home Party Festival Floral Arrangements Decoration(Deep Pink/Pink/White - Each 4pcs)
features: 【 Lifelike Material & 3 Spring Colours 】- The peonies flowers adopt premium silk material,real touch and natural-looking,and gorgeous color matching(white,light pink,deep pink),making it more lifelike and vibrant just like real flowers,giving you the perfect peony flower bunch for celebrating every important moment in your life.

【 Package with 2 Color Satin Ribbons & 1 Greeting Card to Design Your Life 】- Each peony flowers is approx 11.8"H x 10.2"W,Peony head: approx 2.7" diameter.With high-grade grey and textured beige make the ribbons looks luxurious and suitable for DIY on all occasions,and with the greeting card, you can even use your DIY bouquet as a meaningful handmade Gift for Wedding Bouquet,Valentine's Day,Mother's Day,Birthday,Graduation,Anniversary or Christmas Decorations etc.,special and lasting.

【 Adjustable for Free DIY or Flower Arrangement 】- The stem of silk peony bouquet is steel wire, which can be bented into various angles according to need. You can work with these silk peony to create many lovely bouquets for DIY floral arrangements decor that fits perfectly into your personal decor.More importantly, silk peony can be perfectly matched with various flowers.

【 Clean Easily & No Smell 】-The natural looking flowers never wilt and can be recyclable, always bright and colorful.No need to water and fertilize,you will always have a bunch of blooming peony,just wiping dust when dirty.And it has no smell,no need to worry pollen allergy,Vintage Artificial Peony is friendly for who don't like strange smell.

【 Decor Anywhere/Anytime 】-The silk peony flowers can be used in multiple scenes,perfect for home,office,garden,balcony decoration wedding bouquet and events decoration.Especially for wedding,shopping shop or decorating dressing tables,etc.
